strengths: Extensive fullstack development experience across multiple languages and frameworks (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
Strong background in scalable architectures, APIs, and database systems (including AWS services and Kubernetes)
Demonstrated interest in clean software architecture, testing methodologies, and collaborative development practices
concerns: Overqualified for an entry-level role with 10+ years of senior-level experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primarily MongoDB and MySQL)
No clear evidence of work in renewable energy/construction technology sectors
response.justification: Bogdan exhibits deep technical expertise across the fullstack spectrum, with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js experience, along with scalable architecture knowledge. However, his extensive senior-level background may be misaligned with the junior/mid-level role's entry-level requirements, and his database experience skews toward NoSQL rather than PostgreSQL. His industry experience also doesn't align directly with renewable energy or construction technology.
